title: Xanthoxalis lotoides
taxonomy: Xanthoxalis lotoides is classified in the family Oxalidaceae, commonly known as the wood sorrel family. This family consists of about 800 species of flowering plants. Xanthoxalis lotoides is a member of the genus Xanthoxalis, which includes about 20 species of flowering plants. The genus Xanthoxalis is part of the tribe Oxalideae, within the family Oxalidaceae. The classification of Xanthoxalis lotoides reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships to other plants in the family.
